revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''2-5-050

The first light to be seen by an observer approaching the coast from the open sea.

It is so situated and has luminous range and geographical range so great that it can be identified at a great distance.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Landfall Light}}
